channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-18
item.description:
Our open-source research community has seen exciting updates across multiple projects. In the `scienceverse/metacheck` repository, a new addition was made to the `data_check` branch, introducing "japs jamovi" courtesy of Lakens. Meanwhile, the `marton-balazs-kovacs/tenzing` project saw improvements to its 'master' branch, with Alex O. Holcombe refining the wording and emphasizing testimonials. Notably, the 'gh-pages' branch of `tenzing` was updated with automated builds for version 0.4.1, thanks to Anka's contributions. These developments highlight the connections between our projects, with a focus on enhancing data checking and research communication tools. As our community continues to grow and collaborate, we celebrate the progress made and look forward to the impact of these updates on our shared research endeavors.

34 commits across 4 active repositories this week.

New releases: oddpub v7.3.0

Most active:

regcheck10 commits
oddpub9 commits
metacheck8 commits
tenzing7 commits

item.title: metacheck: 1 commit today
item.description:
scienceverse/metacheck

The `data_check` branch was worked on, where the commit added "japs jamovi" as per the message "Lakens: add japs jamovi". No other branches were modified in this set of commits. This specific addition was the sole change made in the repository since the last update. The commit message does not provide further details on the functionality or purpose of "japs jamovi", only that it was added by Lakens. There are no other changes or additions to report from the provided commit messages. The work was limited to a single branch and a single, specific addition.

1 commit(s) today:

  • 0612101 [data_check] add japs jamovi — Lakens

View all commits →

item.title: tenzing: 7 commits today
item.description:
marton-balazs-kovacs/tenzing

Work was done on the 'master' branch, where Alex O. Holcombe made changes to the wording, specifically "improving wording" and then further "rewording" the text. Additionally, Alex O. Holcombe "Italicize testimonials for emphasis" on the 'master' branch. The 'gh-pages' branch saw two updates, both by Anka, who "Built site for tenzing@0.4.1" with different commit hashes, e81218b and 99b3ee2. These 'gh-pages' updates were likely automated builds for the tenzing site at version 0.4.1. The changes on 'master' appear to be focused on text formatting and emphasis.

7 commit(s) today:

  • 72ba97c [gh-pages] Built site for tenzing@0.4.1: e81218b — Anka
  • e81218b [master] improving wording — Alex O. Holcombe
  • 2365b27 [master] reword — Alex O. Holcombe
  • 92af8bb [gh-pages] Built site for tenzing@0.4.1: 99b3ee2 — Anka
  • 99b3ee2 [master] Italicize testimonials for emphasis — Alex O. Holcombe

View all commits →
